source_section.title_label_raw: Signage Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses
provisions.text: In any ER-3, ER-2, or ER-1 zone, the following requirements shall apply to any sign advertising a short-term bedroom rental use: (RC- Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses
provisions.text: A maximum of one sign is permitted per short-term bedroom rental use; (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses
provisions.text: The sign shall only be a ground sign, fascia sign, or projecting sign;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses
provisions.text: The sign shall not exceed 0.6 square metre in area;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses
provisions.text: Any ground sign shall not exceed a height of 1.2 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, and CH-1 Zones Signs for Short-term Bedroom Rental Uses
provisions.text: If the sign is illuminated, only exterior shielded illumination is permitted. Signs for Home Occupation Uses, Daycare Uses, and the Sale of Urban Agricultural Products as an Accessory Use

sections.title_label_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following requirements shall apply to any sign advertising a home occupation use, daycare use, or the sale of urban agricultural products as an accessory use:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: A maximum of one sign is permitted per use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: The sign shall only be a ground sign, fascia sign, or projecting sign;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: The sign shall not exceed 0.6 square metre in area;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: Any ground sign shall not exceed a height of 1.2 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: The sign shall not be illuminated. Signs for Urban Farm Uses

sections.title_label_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following requirements shall apply to any sign advertising an urban farm use:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: A maximum of one ground sign is permitted per street frontage for any urban farm use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: The ground sign shall not exceed 2.0 square metres in area, and shall not exceed a height of 1.2 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, the following
provisions.text: The ground sign shall not be illuminated. Signs for Community Recreation Uses

sections.title_label_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any sign for a

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any sign for a
provisions.text: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any sign for a community recreation use shall meet the requirements of Sections 462 to 465. Bonus Zoning
